issues.description: SearchDeck with destination 'hand' is incorrect. Card effect specifies adding to 'top of your Life cards face-up', not hand. Should use custom action or clarify Life pile mechanic.
Filter uses 'maxCost:5' but effect requires 'cost of 5' exactly (not up to 5). Should be 'cost':5 or 'exactCost':5
Missing second trigger for '[End of Your Turn] Trash all your face-up Life cards.' Must include separate effect with trigger 'EndOfTurn' and action 'TrashFromHand' or equivalent targeting Life cards.
Effect allows looking at 5 cards and choosing up to 1 Character with cost 5, then ordering remaining 4 cards at bottom of deck. Current DSL does not capture the card selection/ordering mechanic.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x2] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and add up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 to the top of your Life cards face-up. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [End of Your Turn] Trash all your face-up Life cards.
